user_story: As an HR admin, I want to toggle between active and inactive projects, so that I can review projects by their current status
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Project Master screen; When I select Active projects or Inactive projects; Then the list shows only projects matching that status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter projects by a period using From and To dates, so that I can find projects within a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Project Master screen; When I set the Period From and To dates and click Search; Then only projects within that period are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter projects by client name, so that I can quickly find all projects for a given client
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Project Master screen; When I enter a client name and click Search; Then only that client's projects are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the filters, so that I can clear my search criteria and see the full project list
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Project Master screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters are cleared and the default list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view project details including client, project code, project name, billable flag, primary approver, dates, resources, Wrike flag, project type and current status, so that I can manage project master data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Project Master screen; When the list loads; Then each project row displays its client, project code, name, is non-billable, primary approver, start and end dates, number of resources, is Wrike project, project type and current status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the project list and refresh it, so that I can navigate all 145 projects and view current data
acceptance_criteria: Given the project list spans multiple pages; When I use the pagination controls or click Refresh; Then the corresponding page of projects is loaded with up-to-date data
